metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by mcules.

plugins.name: todo-buffer
plugins.description: Frictionless personal todo capture into a single markdown file. Intercepts `todo:` / `todo!` prompts via hook, supports listing and Jira-ticket handoff via skill.

plugins.name: create-jira-task
plugins.description: Turn a rough request into a full Jira ticket via the Atlassian MCP. Two-phase flow (proposal → per-ticket confirmation → create). Project, fields, language convention, SP matrix and split thresholds are configured per-repo via `.claude/create-jira-task.json`.

plugins.name: create-github-issue
plugins.description: Turn a rough request into a full GitHub issue via a GitHub MCP. Two-phase flow (proposal → per-ticket confirmation → create). Repo (owner/repo), labels, milestone mode, language convention, estimation matrix and split thresholds are configured per-repo via `.claude/create-github-issue.json`.

plugins.name: load-jira-task
plugins.description: Start work on a Jira ticket: fetch it via the Atlassian MCP, create a matching feature branch off the latest sprint branch, and transition the issue to 'In Progress'. Branch name pattern `<KEY>-<id>-<sanitised-title>`. Jira target and branch/sprint/status conventions configured per-repo via `.claude/load-jira-task.json`; interactive bootstrap when config is missing.
